title: Archiving items and portfolios does not work as expected
excerpt: When archiving a project or item in the portfolio, it’s removed permanently. This is confusing as ‘archive’ doesn’t mean delete permanently. It also causes disruption as users archive items with the expectation that we’l…

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml:
When archiving a project or item in the portfolio, it’s removed permanently. This is confusing as ‘archive’ doesn’t mean delete permanently. It also causes disruption as users archive items with the expectation that we’ll be able to recover it.

Request
When archiving a project or item in the portfolio, it should work the same way as archiving a board or item in a board.
